title: Art appraisers in Kansas City, Missouri

location.name: Art appraisers in Kansas City, Missouri
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Kansas City, Missouri.

listedAppraisers.name: American Legacy Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: American Legacy Gallery is a long-standing Kansas City fine art gallery with over 49 years in business. Located on Main St in the Brookside area, they offer art gallery services, picture frame repair and restoration, art goods, and appraisal services. Verified via Yellow Pages listing.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA)
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European art, American art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in online appraisals, fine art, antiques. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates (EA)
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates (EA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in paintings, sculpture, photography, rare books. With Since 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in high-value art appraisals, global asset management. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Haney Appraisals in Fine Art
listedAppraisers.description: Haney Appraisals in Fine Art provides professional art appraisal services specializing in traditional mediums, painting, printmaking, photography, sculpture, ceramics. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Hilliard Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Hilliard Gallery is one of Kansas City's most prominent art galleries with over 52 years in business. Voted best gallery in Missouri and a top 25 gallery in the United States by American Art Awards. Located in the Crossroads Arts District on Mcgee St, they offer fine art gallery services, appraisals, and consultations. Verified via Yellow Pages listing.

listedAppraisers.name: Janet L. Ross
listedAppraisers.description: Janet L. Ross provides professional art appraisal services specializing in fine art prints (engravings/etchings), antique furniture. With Since 2008 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Justin Rogers
listedAppraisers.description: Justin Rogers offers art appraisal services serving Kansas City, MO. FAIR directory data indicates specialties in Art, Drawings, Paintings, Prints, Sculpture, ISA CAPP, with direct website contact available for project-specific valuation requests.

listedAppraisers.name: LEOPOLDgallery and ARTconsulting
listedAppraisers.description: LEOPOLDgallery and ARTconsulting has served the Kansas City art community for over 35 years. Located on W 63rd St in the Brookside/Waldo area, they combine gallery services with professional art consulting. Known for excellent customer service, personal attention, and strong support of the local artist community. Verified via Yellow Pages listing with positive customer reviews.

listedAppraisers.name: Madison Group Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Madison Group Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in general fine art evaluations. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Mimesis Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in art valuations, consignment-based sales. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Page Art, Inc.
listedAppraisers.description: Page Art, Inc. provides professional art appraisal services specializing in insurance appraisals, estate appraisals, donation appraisals, litigation appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Saylor Rice Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Saylor Rice Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in insurance appraisals, damage/loss appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
